rulings.Case Title: MELBA TYSON VS. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: AMENDED MOTION For Peremptory Writ Of Administrative Mandate
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 13, 2017 line 1. PETITIONER MELBA TYSON AMENDED MOTION For Peremptory Writ Of Administrative Mandate Continued to November 2, 2017. Opposing party to provide courtesy copy of opposition no later than October 16, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BERRY JOE CORPORATION VS. RAYMOND S CHOY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION For Court To Select And Appointment Of Arbitrator And Impose Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 13, 2017 line 3. PLAINTIFF BERRY JOE CORPORATION's MOTION For Court To Select And Appointment Of Arbitrator And Impose Monetary Sanctions GRANTED. David Finkelstein is appointed arbitrator with the powers to appoint an independent appraiser. Request for sanctions is denied. Moving party prepare order.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WILFORD GARDNER VS. SCOTT R HODGES ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 13, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANT SCOTT HODGES's MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION GRANTED. Moving party has shifted its burden and opposition party failed to create a triable issue of fact with competent admissible evidence. Specifically, no evidence in the form of certified records of the county tax collector showing timely payment of taxes for 5 continuous years; and no evidence provided re: "clear showing of the assertion of a hostile claim and actual or constructive notice" in a family context.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MEI LEUNG VS. KATHERINE ALVAREZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 13, 2017 line 8. DEFENDANT KATHERINE ALVAREZ MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER GRANTED. No triable issues of fact exist. The operative Notice is fatally defective and it fails to provide information required by CC 1946.1; it cannot support a cause of action for unlawful detainer. = (501/REQ)
